entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency spot exchange providing order-book markets, public market data, authenticated market, limit, stop-market and stop-limit orders, account balances, and API/WebSocket access.
entity.notes: Official ICRYPEX developer documentation identifies a spot exchange API with exchange info, tickers, order books, trades, authenticated order placement and cancellation, account order history, balances, and WebSocket channels. Confidence is medium because the selected first-party developer documentation is older than the current candidate verification snapshot, although the June 2026 candidate corpus independently detected the same icrypex.com exchange identity.

evidence.title: ICRYPEX API Documentation
evidence.notes: Official ICRYPEX developer documentation identifies the service as a spot exchange and documents REST APIs, authenticated API keys, public trading data, authenticated trading, funding, and WebSocket channels.

evidence.title: ICRYPEX Public Trading Endpoints
evidence.notes: Official public trading documentation covers exchange asset and pair information, enabled status, spot market types, supported order types, tickers, order-book asks and bids, and recent trades.

evidence.title: ICRYPEX Authenticated Trading Endpoints
evidence.notes: Official authenticated trading documentation covers market, limit, stop-market, and stop-limit order placement, order cancellation, open-order queries, order history, and user trade history.
